title: Preserve real Git Bash and Codex integration under sandbox metadata
action: Keep real Git, Bash and Codex CLI integration commands per decision a83a3613. Replace only hook-contract nested Node launches with the shared Worker runner. For external spawnSync results, judge command success from the concrete status/stdout/stderr contract rather than treating an additional sandbox EPERM marker as automatic failure; still fail on null/nonzero status or missing expected output. Preserve git ls-files tracked-path semantics and every route/catalog assertion. Do not split, skip, mock or downgrade external acceptance rows.

truths: Portable paths still scans git ls-files tracked paths and passes only on concrete status zero output.
Hook contract Node wrappers execute through Worker while real Git Bash and Codex rows still invoke their binaries.
A genuine nonzero/null external result still fails loudly.
No external acceptance row is skipped or emulated.

artifacts.substantive: Worker Node wrappers plus preserved external integration

key_links: hook contract imports the shared runner produced by cell 2
all external result checks distinguish valid status/output from sandbox error metadata
prohibitions: No filesystem-walk substitute for git ls-files
No external acceptance split or skip

verify: node scripts/test_portable_paths.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && git diff --check
